title: PORTICO structured spec
description: Bounded specification the LLM fills in from natural language. It does NOT contain node-by-node geometry or engineering values: the deterministic generator derives those from this spec + rules.json + CSV libraries.

typology.description: frame = portal frame of columns and beams. timber_walls = light stud framing (timber or steel). truss = roof truss (Warren/Pratt/Howe). bridge = deck/central beam on piers. warehouse = industrial shed. torre = transmission tower / 3D space lattice (4 tapered legs + crossarms). primitives = FREE STRUCTURE for ANY case without a template: fill 'elements' and 'supports' with coordinates. Use 'primitives' when no template fits.

levels.description: One object per story, bottom to top. Each level can have a different height and a different use/loads (e.g. level 1 classrooms, level 3 light storage).

use_class.description: Use of THIS level (overrides loads.use_class). E.g. 'Escuelas/Salas de Clases', 'Bodegas/Livianas'.

live_load_kN_m2.description: Explicit override of this level's live load.

dead_extra_kN_m2.description: Area dead load for this level (override).

spans_x.description: Spans in X: list of lengths [3,3,3,4] or uniform {count, span_m}. Alternative to base_plan.Lx_m / ejes_x_m.

spans_y.description: Spans in Y (3D): list of lengths or uniform {count, span_m}.

base_plan.description: Plan dimensions (alternative to spans_x/spans_y or axes). Define at least one geometry path per direction.

top_plan.description: If omitted, equal to the base plan (constant plan). If it differs, the generator interpolates linearly between levels.

axes_x_m.description: Axis coordinates in X (optional). If omitted, the generator subdivides Lx by the maximum span separation.

axes_y_m.description: Axis coordinates in Y (optional, ignored in 2D).

tributary_width_m.description: 2D only: spacing between frames to distribute area loads to lines.

roof_slope_deg.description: Roof slope (degrees); affects Cs (snow) and GCpf (wind).

material.description: Steel (S235/S275/S355/A630-420H) or concrete (G20/G25/G30/G40). fc in MPa → G{fc}, e.g. fc=30 → 'G30'.

beams.description: Steel profile (string, e.g. 'IPE300') or rectangular concrete section {b_cm,h_cm}.

columns.description: Steel profile (string, e.g. 'HEB200') or rectangular concrete section {b_cm,h_cm}.

dead_extra_kN_m2.description: Area dead load in addition to self-weight (slab, finishes).

use_class.description: Use description in live_loads.csv (e.g. 'Escuelas/Salas de Clases').

live_load_kN_m2.description: Explicit override of the use live load (kN/m²); if given, it prevails over the use class.

seismic.description: NCh433/DS61 parameters for the spectral cases (if loads.seismic = true).

stud_walls.description: typology = 'timber_walls' only. Stud-wall framing: vertical studs + plates (bottom/top). The plan (geometry.base_plan Lx_m, Ly_m) defines the perimeter.

nominal_size.description: Stud size in inches, e.g. '2x4', '2x6'. Also accepts {b_cm,h_cm} but the commercial size is usual.

perimeter.description: Generate the 4 perimeter walls on each level.

diagonals.description: Add bracing diagonals (zigzag) to the walls.

diagonal_bays.description: Number of stud bays each diagonal spans (3 bays = crosses 2 studs).

interior.description: Interior partitions. Each is a line in plan with optional openings (doors/windows).

level.description: Level the partition sits on (1 = first story).

dir.description: Direction of the partition line in plan.

pos_m.description: Perpendicular coordinate of the partition (if dir=Y it is X; if dir=X it is Y). 'center' ≈ L/2.

opening_height_m.description: Opening (lintel) height from the wall base.

center_m.description: Position of the opening center along the partition line. If omitted, at the wall center.

floors.description: typology = 'timber_walls' only. Floor/roof joists resting on the walls.

dir.description: Direction the joists run (resting on the perpendicular walls).

roof.description: typology = 'timber_walls' only. Building roof. Flat by default (joists). With type 'truss' it crowns the building with gabled Warren trusses integrated over the walls.

type.description: plano = joist platform; truss = gabled Warren trusses.

dir.description: Direction the trusses span. If omitted, they span the shorter side.

n_panels.description: Number of panels of each truss (even).

truss_type.description: Web pattern of the roof trusses.

truss.description: typology = 'truss' only. Gabled Warren roof truss (triangulated lattice, zigzag diagonals). ONE representative planar truss is generated (X–Z plane), loaded by its tributary width (spacing_m).

ridge_height_m.description: Ridge height above the supports (overrides slope_pct).

n_panels.description: Number of bottom-chord panels (even, so the ridge lines up).

spacing_m.description: Spacing between trusses (tributary load width; e.g. 0.6 = @60 cm).

truss_type.description: Web pattern: warren (zigzag), pratt (verticals + tension diagonals) or howe.

bridge.description: typology = 'bridge' only. Deck of length×width. Forms: beam/truss on piers (type tablero/viga_central) or ARCH/CABLE (type arco, arco_atirantado/bowstring, network, atirantado, colgante). For arch/cable use flecha_m, n_pendolas, altura_pilon_m/altura_torre_m, escuadria_arco/escuadria_pilon.

pier_height_m.description: Pier height (deck level above the base).

pier_span_m.description: Spacing between piers (e.g. 20 = every 20 m). Alternative: n_pilas.

n_piers.description: Number of pier lines (alternative to pier_span_m).

type.description: tablero = 2 longitudinal beams + transverse beams. viga_central = ONE central beam + transverse beams on piers. arco = deck-arch with spandrel posts (Salginatobel type). arco_atirantado = bowstring (arch over the tie-deck, vertical hangers; vertical supports only). network = bowstring with CROSSED inclined hangers. atirantado = central pylon + fan stays (cable-stayed). colgante = parabolic suspension cable + towers + hangers (suspension).

rise_m.description: Arch rise (arco/bowstring/network) or cable sag (colgante). Default ≈ L/6 (arch) or L/10 (suspension).

pylon_height_m.description: Pylon height above the deck (cable-stayed). Default ≈ L/4.

n_hangers.description: Number of hangers/stays per plane (arch/cable). Default ≈ L/8.

girder_type.description: type=tablero only: beam = continuous longitudinals; truss = lattice girders under the deck.

depth_m.description: Depth of the lattice girder (if tipo_viga='truss').

panels_per_span.description: Lattice panels per span between piers.

central_beam_section.description: Section of the central longitudinal beam (viga_central), e.g. {b_cm:50,h_cm:200}.

transverse_section.description: Section of the transverse beams (viga_central), e.g. {b_cm:30,h_cm:80}.

diagonal_size.description: Section of the deck diagonals/transverse beams.

transverse_load_kN_m.description: Uniform line load (kN/m) applied ONLY to the transverse beams (viga_central).

warehouse.description: typology = 'warehouse' only. Industrial shed: frames (columns) spaced along the length + gabled roof trusses (Warren/Pratt/Howe) + purlins.

ridge_height_m.description: Ridge height above the eaves (overrides slope_pct).

n_panels.description: Number of panels of each truss (even).

default_material.description: typology = 'primitives' only. Default material of the elements (e.g. 'G50', 'S275', 'Pino Radiata'). Each element can override with its own 'material'.

elements.description: typology = 'primitives' only. List of bars in [x,y,z] coordinates (m). Bars that share a point are joined automatically (same node). With this you build ANY structure (tower, mast, grillage, N-beam bridge…).

type.description: barra/beam/column = a bar from 'from' to 'to'. repeated_beams = a base bar repeated along 'step_dir' every 'step'.

n.description: Bar subdivisions (intermediate nodes). Useful for loads/deflected shape.

load_kN_m.description: Vertical line load (kN/m) on this bar(s) → LL case.

n_repeat.description: repeated_beams only: how many copies (alternative: to_coord).

to_coord.description: repeated_beams only: end coordinate along step_dir (alternative to n_repeat).

supports.description: typology = 'primitives' only. Supports on existing nodes (must match bar endpoints).

en.description: List of points [x,y,z] where the support is applied.

z.description: Apply to ALL nodes at this z level (e.g. z:0 = the whole base).

oneOf.description: Steel profile name in profiles.csv (e.g. 'IPE300', 'HEB200'). Also accepts 'b x h' in cm.
Solid rectangular section (concrete): b = width, h = depth.
